brand.name: The Iron Quill
brand.subtitle: Ancient Ledger Edition
brand.tagline: Where every name enters the chronicle, and every word lingers like candlelight in ancient halls.

brochureIntro.title: The Shire Inn
brochureIntro.summary: A storybook stay in a grand rustic retreat with fireplaces, reading nooks, romantic suites, and quiet corners for long candlelit evenings.
brochureIntro.motto: Sleep in comfort. Wake in a fairytale.

highlights.title: Hearthhall Lounge
highlights.detail: Grand gathering hall arranged around the fireplace with candlelight, soft seating, and mountain-facing windows. Ideal for evening reading, quiet conversation, and slow winter nights.

highlights.title: Raven's Rest Library
highlights.detail: An old-world reading retreat filled with books, warm lamplight, and the spirit of old stories. Perfect for journaling, board games, and lingering over the guestbook.

highlights.title: Oak & Ember Dining Room
highlights.detail: Rustic farmhouse dining with timbered ceilings, breakfast spreads, candlelit suppers, platters of food, and tasting menus in a cozy manor-house setting.

highlights.title: Guest Suites & Manor Grounds
highlights.detail: A dramatic country manor with archways, stone corridors, turret views, and richly dressed suites designed for literary escapes, romantic weekends, and retreat stays.

rooms.title: Embermere Suite
rooms.palette: Amber gold, walnut brown, charcoal grey
rooms.detail: A warm and intimate suite with rich wood tones and evening-repose energy for couples seeking a refined fireside retreat.

rooms.title: Moonthorn Chamber
rooms.palette: Midnight blue, silver ash, soft ivory
rooms.detail: A refined chamber inspired by moonlight through cathedral windows, balancing drama and softness with a noble stillness.

rooms.title: Willowfen Room
rooms.palette: Sage green, linen cream, warm oak
rooms.detail: A lighter room for guests seeking peace, fresh air, and the natural hush of an early countryside morning.

rooms.title: Hearthstone Chamber
rooms.detail: A lived-in, low-to-earth suite that pairs rugged texture with the glow of a crackling fire and timeless inn character.

rooms.title: Starfall Loft
rooms.detail: A dreamy upper-level room with reading alcove energy for romantics, booklovers, and anyone drawn to wonder.

rooms.title: Rowanveil Suite
rooms.detail: A suite that combines rustic luxury with nature-toned comfort for a stay that feels both polished and grounded.

rooms.title: Thistlekeep Room
rooms.detail: A vintage room with countryside elegance for guests who love traditional comfort and heirloom detail.

rooms.title: Sable Hearth Suite
rooms.detail: A rich dramatic suite made for quiet nights, deep sleep, and the feeling of being safely tucked away from the world.

brochurePanels.title: Front Cover
brochurePanels.caption: A storybook stay in a grand rustic retreat.

brochurePanels.title: Welcome Panel
brochurePanels.caption: The inn brochure introduces spaces, guest rooms, dining, and the character of the stay.

brochurePanels.title: Booking Panel
brochurePanels.caption: Ideal for literary escapes, romantic getaways, and cozy group stays.

brochurePanels.title: Experiences Panel
brochurePanels.caption: Fireside evenings, reading hours, candlelit dining, scenic wandering, and private retreat time.

brochurePanels.title: Guest Rooms I–IV
brochurePanels.caption: Four suites framed around hearth tones, moonlit calm, woodland mornings, and rustic lodge warmth.

brochurePanels.title: Guest Rooms V–VIII
brochurePanels.caption: A second set of suites built around wonder, elegance, manor charm, and moody luxury.

rotatingLines: The house waits beneath olive velvet drapery and candlelit rafters.
A new page opens each time the owl courier takes wing with a sealed letter.
The Shire Inn brochure rustles like folded parchment beside the guest ledger.
Stories travel further when they leave the hall beneath the crest of the Iron Quill.
